title: InLife – Society Landing

fields.label: Hero kicker
fields.name: society_hero_kicker
fields.instructions: Short label above the title, e.g. SPOŁECZEŃSTWO.

fields.label: Hero title
fields.name: society_hero_title
fields.instructions: Main H1 for the Society landing page.

fields.label: Hero lead
fields.name: society_hero_lead
fields.instructions: Lead paragraph under the title.

fields.label: Primary CTA
fields.name: society_hero_primary_cta
fields.instructions: Optional primary button in the hero.

fields.label: Secondary CTA
fields.name: society_hero_secondary_cta
fields.instructions: Optional secondary button in the hero.

fields.label: Hero media
fields.name: society_hero_media
fields.instructions: Optional visual content shown in hero.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload hero image. Remember meaningful alt text.

sub_fields.label: Video embed URL
sub_fields.name: video_embed_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional YouTube/Vimeo link if hero should show video instead of image.

sub_fields.label: Caption / note
sub_fields.name: caption
sub_fields.instructions: Optional short supporting text near the media.

fields.label: Show section
fields.name: society_science_section_enabled
fields.instructions: Toggle the whole ‘Nauka dla Ciebie’ block.

fields.label: Main content
fields.name: society_science_content
fields.instructions: Main editorial description. Can contain lists and links.

fields.label: Media type
fields.name: society_science_media_type
fields.instructions: Choose what accompanies the section content.

fields.label: Section CTA
fields.name: society_science_cta
fields.instructions: Optional button below the content.

fields.label: Archive / all articles page
fields.name: society_articles_archive_page
fields.instructions: Select the page that will list all Society articles.

fields.label: Section intro
fields.name: society_articles_intro
fields.instructions: Optional short intro above article cards.

fields.label: Landing content mode
fields.name: society_articles_mode
fields.instructions: Choose whether the landing shows manually selected posts or latest posts from Society taxonomy/query.

fields.label: Number of cards
fields.name: society_articles_count
fields.instructions: Recommended: 3 or 6.

fields.label: Show badge on cards
fields.name: society_articles_show_badge
fields.instructions: Badge should usually come from Society taxonomy term.

fields.label: Manual posts
fields.name: society_articles_manual_posts
fields.instructions: Pick posts to show on landing in desired order.

fields.label: Latest mode note
fields.message: Recommended implementation: query only posts marked for Society using your dedicated taxonomy/terms, not all recent posts.

fields.label: Section title
fields.name: society_initiatives_title
fields.instructions: Recommended label: Projekty i inicjatywy.

fields.label: Section intro
fields.name: society_initiatives_intro
fields.instructions: Optional supporting text above the cards.

fields.label: Initiative pages
fields.name: society_initiatives_pages
fields.instructions: Pick initiative pages to feature on the landing page.

fields.label: Optional ‘all initiatives’ page
fields.name: society_initiatives_archive_page
fields.instructions: Optional page for broader listing of initiatives.

fields.label: Card emphasis
fields.name: society_initiatives_card_style
fields.instructions: Visual hint for template logic. Useful if one initiative should be highlighted.

fields.label: Section title
fields.name: society_media_title
fields.instructions: Recommended label: Podcasty i infografiki.

fields.label: Section intro
fields.name: society_media_intro
fields.instructions: Optional intro for the media block.

fields.label: Content mode
fields.name: society_media_mode
fields.instructions: Choose whether this block uses manual selection or latest filtered posts.

fields.label: Number of cards
fields.name: society_media_count
fields.instructions: Recommended: 3 or 4.

fields.label: Archive / all media page
fields.name: society_media_archive_page
fields.instructions: Optional destination for ‘view all’ button.

fields.label: Manual media posts
fields.name: society_media_manual_posts
fields.instructions: Select podcast / infographic / media posts to feature.

fields.label: Section intro
fields.name: society_meet_us_intro
fields.instructions: Optional short introduction.

fields.label: Meet us cards
fields.name: society_meet_us_cards
fields.instructions: Recommended cards: Spotkania edukacyjne, Zajęcia w labach, Warsztaty w terenie.

fields.label: Form shortcode
fields.name: society_meet_us_form_shortcode
fields.instructions: Optional form shown directly on landing or linked page.

fields.label: Form note
fields.name: society_meet_us_form_note
fields.instructions: Optional note above the form.

fields.label: Optional full page
fields.name: society_schools_page
fields.instructions: Optional dedicated page for schools.

fields.label: Content
fields.name: society_schools_content
fields.instructions: Text for schools and educational partners.

fields.label: Form shortcode
fields.name: society_schools_form_shortcode
fields.instructions: E.g. sign-up form for school mailing base.

description: Fields for the main Society landing page.
